name: Boston Chicken Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 14 cups Dry chopped onions (reconstituted in 1/4 cup hot water for 5 minutes)
24 oz Jar Great Northern beans (drain, rinse and drain)
1/2 cup Open Pit Hickory Flavored BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Reconstitute the chopped onions by soaking them in 1/4 cup hot water for 5 minutes.
2. Drain and rinse the Great Northern beans, then drain again.
3. In a 4-quart baking dish or pan, combine the drained beans, Pork & Beans, ketchup, BBQ sauce, and chopped ham.
4. Stir to mix well.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 30-35 minutes, stirring 2-3 times during cooking until hot and bubbly.
6. Allow to cool before refrigerating covered for up to one week, or freeze for up to four months.
